zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Villiers於大約1345年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾吉努爾頓時，她的父親Payn Villiers36歲，母親Isabella de Villers21歲。她於1367年與Godfrey de Foljambe II在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1398年在英國德比夏爾達利 戴爾享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Villiers was born about 1345, in Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Payn Villiers, was 36 and her mother, Isabella de Villers, was 21. She married Godfrey de Foljambe II in 1367, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1398, in Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Villiers est née environ 1345, à Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Payn Villiers, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Villers, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Godfrey de Foljambe II en 1367, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1398, à Darley Dale, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Villiers um 1345 in Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Payn Villiers 36 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Villers 21. Sie hat 1367 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England Godfrey de Foljambe II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1398 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Villiers è nata il circa 1345 nel Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Payn Villiers, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Villers, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Godfrey de Foljambe II nel 1367, nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1398, nel Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Villiersが約1345年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアキノウルトンで生まれた時，父Payn Villiersは36歳，母Isabella de Villersは21歳であった。1367年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルでGodfrey de Foljambe IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1398年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアダルリー ダルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Villiers(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 킨우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Payn Villiers(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Villers(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 Godfrey de Foljambe II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 영국 더비실르 더를리 데일에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Villiers nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Payn Villiers, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Villers, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfrey de Foljambe II em 1367, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1398, em Darley Dale, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Villiers родилась около 1345 г. в местности киноултон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Payn Villiers было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Villers, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfrey de Foljambe II в 1367 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1398 г. в местности дарли деил, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Villiers nació aproximadamente 1345, en Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Payn Villiers, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabella de Villers, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Godfrey de Foljambe II en 1367, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1398, en Darley Dale, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
